title: AE2 UEL: Extended
description: This is a fork of AE2 Unofficial Extended Life which adds some improvements and an additional content
body:
### This project is deprecated. Please take a look at [this one](https://modrinth.com/mod/crazyae)


AE2 UEL: Extended - Break the limits!

 

This is a fork of AE2 Unofficial Extended Life which adds some improvements and an additional content, such as: -

Improved crafting processors. -

Improved crafting so-processors. -

Improved storage cells. -

And also, now dense cables, P2P ME tunnels and controllers can transmit up to 256 channels Browse the gallery to see more!
